overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy, moonlit rural landscape at night. The character traverses a snow-covered path beside a wooden fence, passes glowing street lamps, and continues along abandoned railroad tracks surrounded by bare winter trees and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy field with wooden fence overlooking distant village

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position along the fence line

agents.ego_description: character in long dark coat walks steadily along snow-covered ground beside wooden fence, heading toward distant lights

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path on the right side
warm yellow lights from buildings visible in the distance against the dark landscape
leafless winter trees with twisted branches silhouetted against the night sky
thick snow covering the ground with visible footprints and grass tufts

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a moonlit snowy field at night, with a character in a long coat standing near a wooden fence. Distant village lights twinkle in the background. The character begins walking forward along the fence line, traversing the deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered trail between stone wall and wooden fence

events.description: character passes under first glowing street lamp, creating warm pool of light on snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow snowy trail, passing sequential street lamps on the left

entered.detail: tall black lamppost with warm orange glow illuminating the snow-covered path
low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower snow-covered trail flanked by a stone wall on the left and the continuing wooden fence on the right. Warm light from street lamps punctuates the blue darkness, and the distant village lights disappear behind as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railroad tracks cutting through snowy forest

events.description: character steps from snow path onto wooden railroad tracks, changing ground surface
industrial tower structure becomes visible through trees on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the railroad tracks, balancing on the wooden ties while heading toward a distant light

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden railroad ties with metal rails curving through the landscape
tall dark industrial tower or building silhouette visible through the bare trees

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the snow path onto abandoned railroad tracks, the ground changing to gravel and wooden ties. An industrial structure looms in the distance on the left as the character walks deeper into the wooded cutting, with the wooden fence now further back on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest railroad cutting with towering trees

events.description: camera tilts upward to frame tall trees against the cloudy night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tracks while the camera tilts up to reveal the height of the surrounding trees and open sky

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with scattered clouds and subtle moonlight breaking through

segments.scene_description: Walking along the tracks through a denser forest section, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the height of the bare trees reaching into the cloudy night sky. The industrial structure and fence disappear behind as the cutting becomes more enclosed by vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curving tracks through open landscape toward distant snow-covered hills

entered.detail: rolling hills blanketed in snow visible in the distance on the right
large snow-capped mountain silhouette on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens up into a wide snowy valley as the character continues along the curving railroad tracks. Snow-covered hills and a distant mountain become visible on the right, while the forest thins out to scattered trees on the left, creating an expansive, isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a moonlit winter landscape that evolves from a rural fence line into an expansive, isolated mountain valley. It begins with a character in a long coat walking through deep snow beside a wooden fence, with distant village lights twinkling in the background. As the path curves, the scene shifts to a narrower trail flanked by a stone wall and punctuated by the warm glow of street lamps before the character transitions onto abandoned railroad tracks. The camera then moves deeper into a wooded cutting, tilting upward toward the bare trees and a cloudy night sky as an industrial structure fades into the distance. Finally, the forest thins out and the landscape opens into a wide snowy valley, revealing curving tracks that lead toward distant, snow-covered hills and mountains.
